label: Record
description: Allows for the control of the video capture.

uploadComplete.label: uploadComplete
uploadComplete.description: Sent by the Cloud to the device when the upload of a clip has completed

capture.label: Record
capture.description: Ask the device to take a clip and upload it to ST

duration.description: Duration, in seconds, of the clip to be captured

prebuffer.description: The amount of time to include in the clip before the capture request was received

mediaUrl.description: URL where the device should upload the clip to (when using tokens)

imageUrl.description: URL where the device should upload an attached image to

clipId.description: The id of the clip to capture, if known

mediaUrlMtls.description: URL where the device should upload the clip to (when using client certificate)

uploadFailed.label: uploadFailed
uploadFailed.description: Sent by the Cloud to the device when the upload of a clip has failed

stopCapture.label: stopCapture
stopCapture.description: Stop an ongoing clip capture activity
